case_title: DARIEN JOSEPH THOMPSON-BLACK VS. CHAMELEON RECYCLING, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF THOMPSON-BLACK, DARIEN JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT CHAMELEON RECYCLING, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA CHAMELEON RECYCLING JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
